  • Method Details

    • employer

      public EmploymentUpdate.Builder employer(String employer)
      The business name of an investor's employer.

    • employer

      public EmploymentUpdate.Builder employer(Optional<String> employer)
      The business name of an investor's employer.

    • employerAddress

      public EmploymentUpdate.Builder employerAddress(PostalAddressUpdate employerAddress)
      Represents a postal address, e.g. for postal delivery or payments addresses. Given a postal address, a postal service can deliver items to a premise, P.O. Box or similar. It is not intended to model geographical locations (roads, towns, mountains).

      In typical usage an address would be created via user input or from importing existing data, depending on the type of process.

      Advice on address input / editing: - Use an i18n-ready address widget such as https://github.com/google/libaddressinput) - Users should not be presented with UI elements for input or editing of fields outside countries where that field is used.

      For more guidance on how to use this schema, please see: https://support.google.com/business/answer/6397478

    • employerAddress

      public EmploymentUpdate.Builder employerAddress(Optional<? extends PostalAddressUpdate> employerAddress)
      Represents a postal address, e.g. for postal delivery or payments addresses. Given a postal address, a postal service can deliver items to a premise, P.O. Box or similar. It is not intended to model geographical locations (roads, towns, mountains).

      In typical usage an address would be created via user input or from importing existing data, depending on the type of process.

      Advice on address input / editing: - Use an i18n-ready address widget such as https://github.com/google/libaddressinput) - Users should not be presented with UI elements for input or editing of fields outside countries where that field is used.

      For more guidance on how to use this schema, please see: https://support.google.com/business/answer/6397478

    • employmentStatus

      public EmploymentUpdate.Builder employmentStatus(EmploymentUpdateEmploymentStatus employmentStatus)
      Classifies in what capacity (or if) the underlying natural person holds a job

    • employmentStatus

      public EmploymentUpdate.Builder employmentStatus(Optional<? extends EmploymentUpdateEmploymentStatus> employmentStatus)
      Classifies in what capacity (or if) the underlying natural person holds a job

    • occupation

      public EmploymentUpdate.Builder occupation(String occupation)
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Required if `employment_status` is one of: - `EMPLOYED` - `SELF_EMPLOYED`

    • occupation

      public EmploymentUpdate.Builder occupation(Optional<String> occupation)
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Required if `employment_status` is one of: - `EMPLOYED` - `SELF_EMPLOYED`

    • startYear

      public EmploymentUpdate.Builder startYear(int startYear)
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Required if `employment_status` is one of: - `EMPLOYED` - `SELF_EMPLOYED`

      Otherwise, must be empty.

    • startYear

      public EmploymentUpdate.Builder startYear(Optional<Integer> startYear)
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Required if `employment_status` is one of: - `EMPLOYED` - `SELF_EMPLOYED`

      Otherwise, must be empty.

    • build

      public EmploymentUpdate build()
